blended.narrative: Jay Peak is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 116 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
